resources.string: Stake the monsters to kill them.
Stake the monsters to kill them off.
\%player\% is a monster and you attacked them!
The Monster Hunter is a Crewmate Killing role with a goal to get rid off the monsters. When there are no monsters left they transform into another crewmate role.
Check if the player is a monster (Werewolf, Vampire or Undead), and attack them if they are.
Self Kill When Run Out of Stakes
Learn what roles players can be.
Inspect the players to get clues towards their roles.
The Inspector is a Crewmate Investigative role with an ability to check players for possible roles.
Get the target's possible roles on the next meeting.
You will receive a report on \%player\% in the following meeting, containing their possible roles.
You inspect that \%player\% has an altered perception of reality
You inspect that \%player\% has an insight for private information
You inspect that \%player\% has an unusual obsession with dead bodies
You inspect that \%player\% is well-trained in hunting down prey
You inspect that \%player\% spreads fear amongst the group
You inspect that \%player\% hides to guard themselves or others
You inspect that \%player\% has a trick up their sleeve
You inspect that \%player\% is capable of performing relentless attacks
You inspect that \%player\% is not from this town
You inspect that \%player\% is one of following roles
Block players from using their abilities.
Give players drinks to temporarly block their abilities.
The Tavern Keeper is a Crewmate Support role that can temporarly block abilities.
Prevents the target from using their abilities for a set duration.
You are felling a bit tipsy and can't concentrate, \%role\% has blocked your ability.
Disguise as an impostor to catch them in the act.
The Undercover is a Crewmate Support role that is disguised as impostor.
On the start of the game, you are given a impostor role as which the other impostors see you.
You are seen by impostors as a \%role\%.
Impostors Can Kill Eachother With Undercover Present
Watch what the players are up to.
The Watcher is an Crewmate Investigative role that can temporarely see through walls.
Temporarely see through walls, while watching you can't move.
Sacrifice yourself to protect the crew.
Protect the players from attackers, dying in the result.
The Bodyguard is a Crewmate Protective role that can protect the player. If the protected player is attacked, both the attacker and Bodyguard die.
Protect the player from attackers. If the player is attacked both you and attacker die.
Kill anyone who tries to interact with the protected.
Protect the players from interactions, by killing.
The Crusader is a Crewmate Protective role that can protect the player. If the protected player is interacted with, the interacting player will die.
Protect the player from interactions. If the player is interacted with, the interacting player will be attacked.
Aim at the players to execute them during meetings.
Aim at the evildoers, to execute them during meeting.
The Executor is a Crewmate Killing role that can aim at players. During meetings they can kill an player they aimed at.
Aim at the player, which you can execute on the next meeting.
You aimed your pistol at \%player\%, you can execute them next meeting.
During meeting, kill one of the aimed players.
Examine the bodies for additional informations.
Autopsy bodies to gain additional information.
The Coroner is a Crewmate Investigative role that can examine bodies, getting additional information about them.
Perform an autopsy on the body, getting additional information about it.
You performed an autopsy on \%player\%, you will receive information about them on the next meeting.
You determined that killer of \%player\% is a lighter color.
You determined that killer of \%player\% is a darker color.
You couldn't determine killer of \%player\%'s color.
You determined that killer of \%player\% either did not leave the area or used an alternative method of escape.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has escaped north.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has escaped east.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has escaped south.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has escaped west.
You determined that killer of \%player\% probably wasn't on the scene of the crime to begin with.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has vanished using unconventional means.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has escaped through vents.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has escaped by walking away or hasn't left the area.
You determined that killer of \%player\% hasn't killed anyone in the past.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has killed only \%count\% people in the past.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has killed \%count\% people in the past.
You determined that killer of \%player\% has massacred \%count\% people in the past.
You determined that death of \%player\% was a suicide.
You determined that killer of \%player\% is \%role\%.
You determined that \%player\% was killed through unconventional means.
You determined that \%player\% was killed normally.
You determined that \%player\% was killed \%time\% seconds ago.
The Reaper is a Neutral Killing role that takes the soul of players. Instead of leaving a body behind, they leave behind a soul-less decoy that looks identical to the reaped player, standing still.
Duel with those pesky landlubbers to get their treasures.
You have successfully won as the \%role\%, as you've won enough duels!
The \%role\%, \%player\%, has successfully won, as they've won enough duels!
The Pirate is a Neutral Outlier role that needs to win a certain amount of duels to win.
Choose a player to duel on the next meeting. During duel both of players have a choice between three options, if the Pirate wins the other player is Killed.

The winner of the duel is determined by whether Pirate and dueled choose the same type of defense/attack marked by a shape. If the type is the same the Pirate wins, otherwise the dueled wins.\%nl\%(\%color=red\%◆\%/color\%) \%b\%Scimitar\%/b\% beats \%b\%Sidestep\%/b\%\%nl\%(\%color=yellow\%▲\%/color\%) \%b\%Rapier\%/b\% beats \%b\%Chainmail\%/b\%\%nl\%(\%color=grey\%●\%/color\%) \%b\%Pistol\%/b\% beats \%b\%Backpedal\%/b\%
You will duel \%player\% on the next meeting.
You challange \%player\% for a duel, choose your weapon.
You were challanged by \%role\% for a duel, choose your method of defense.
\%player\% tried to Sidestep your attack, but nothing escapes your Scimitar.
\%player\% put on a Chainmail, but your Rapier pierces right trough.
\%player\% Backpedaled your attack, but your Pistol reaches them anyway.
You tried to Sidestep the attack, but the Scimitar was too fast.
You put on a Chainmail, but the Rapier pierces right trough.
You Backpedaled the attack, but the Pistol reaches you anyway.
You tried to slice \%player\% with your Scimitar, but they put on a Chainmail.
You tried to slice \%player\% with your Scimitar, but they Backpedaled your attack.
You tried to jab \%player\% with your Rapier, but they Sidestepped your attack.
You tried to jab \%player\% with your Rapier, but they Backpedaled your attack.
You tried to shoot \%player\% with your Pistol, but they Sidestepped your attack.
You tried to shoot \%player\% with your Pistol, but they put on a Chainmail.
Someone tried to slice you with Scimitar, but you put on a Chainmail.
Someone tried to slice you with Scimitar, but you Backpedaled their attack.
Someone tried to jab you with Rapier, but you Sidestepped their attack.
Someone tried to jab you with Rapier, but you Backpedaled their attack.
Someone tried to shoot you with Pistol, but you Sidestepped their attack.
Someone tried to shoot you with Pistol, but you put on a Chainmail.
Kill players to fill out your bloodlust.
The blood of your victims flows through you, you feel unstoppable.
The blood keeps flowing feeding the beast within.
Your blood settles, you regain control of yourself.
The Bloodhound is a Neutral Killing role that can kill. After they kill a certain amount of players, their kill cooldown is temporarely decreased.
You have successfully won as the \%role\%, as there are no crewmates left!
The \%role\%, \%player\%, has successfully won, as there are no crewmates left!
Control the players into using their abilities.
Survive to see the crew lose.
The Witch is a Neutral Evil role that needs to survive and make crewmates lose to win. They also have the ability to force someone into using their ability.
Mark a player to later control them.
Force a marked player to use their ability, and get a hint towards their role.
You tried to force \%player\% into using their ability but they don't have any or was unusable.
You forced \%player\% into using their primary ability.
You forced \%player\% into using their secondary ability.
You forced \%player\% into using their tertiary ability.
You tried to force \%player\% into using their ability but they don't have any or was unusable. They are \%role\%.
You forced \%player\% into using their primary ability. They are \%role\%.
You forced \%player\% into using their secondary ability. They are \%role\%.
You forced \%player\% into using their tertiary ability. They are \%role\%.
A \%role\% attempted to force you to use your ability, but you don't have any or was unusable.
You were forced by a \%role\% to use your primary ability.
You were forced by a \%role\% to use your secondary ability.
You were forced by a \%role\% to use your tertiary ability.
Choose a player to swap roles with.
You regained a spark from your soul, you feel like a \%role\%
You feel like you lost something deep inside you, your soul was swapped by a \%role\%
The Cursed Soul is a Neutral Benign role that can and must swap roles with other players.
Attempt to swap roles with a player, with a chance to swap with a random player instead.
Ressurect players to create an army of dead.
Resurrect players to convert them to your team.
You reanimated \%player\% and incorporated them into your ranks.
You were reanimated by \%player\%, the \%role\%. You join to the ranks of the undead.
The Necromancer is a Neutral Outlier role that can reanimate a dead body to make them join their faction. Necromancer wins when they with their undead outnumber the crew.
Resurrect a player to join the ranks of undead.
Show Arrows Pointing To Dead Bodies
Wait until your recruits kill off the crew.
In result of your recruits death, you decided to take the matter into your own hands. You have gained the ability to kill.

The Jackal is a Neutral Outlier role that starts with two recruits from two diffrent factions. Recruits lose their original win condidtion and their goal is to help the Jackal win. If all recruits are dead Jackal gains the ability to kill.
Resurrect a player to join the ranks of undead.
The Pestilence is a Neutral Killing role that can kill and is invincible to everything but being exiled or guessing incorrectly. They win with other apocalypse members.
Slowly drain everyone's power with hunger.

The Famine is a Neutral Apocalypse role that starves the crew, killing them if they are out of bread. They are invincible to everything but being exiled or guessing incorrectly. They win with other apocalypse members.
All of the Crew's bread has been given out.\%nl\%\%role\%, Horseman of the Apocalypse, has emerged!
Mere existance of \%role\% drains power\%nl\%from you, your stomach is feeling empty.
Mere existance of \%role\% drains power\%nl\%from the Crew, however you are able to\%nl\%keep it together.
Once every so often, and after meetings, all players lose one bread. If players don't have any bread they die instead.
Reduces bread of the player by a set amount. If this ability tries to take bread they don't have it kills instead.
Give out bread, until there's nothing left.
Feed the players bread to transform.
The Baker is a Neutral Apocalypse role that needs to feed a certain amount of players to transform into Famine.
Feeds the player bread. After a set amount of bread was given, Baker transforms into Famine.
Kill players in order to transform.
Hack and slash players to transform.
Murder everyone and start an eternal war.

The War is a Neutral Apocalypse role that can kill multiple people in short period of time. They are invincible to everything but being exiled or guessing incorrectly. They win with other apocalypse members.
The Crew has been consumed in a great battle.\%nl\%\%role\%, Horseman of the Apocalypse, has emerged!
Collect souls from dead bodies to transform.
Collect souls from recently deceased to transform.
The Soul Collector is a Neutral Apocalypse role that needs to collect certain amount of souls from dead bodies to transform into Death.
Collect a soul from a dead body. After a set amount of souls were collected, Soul Collector transforms into Death.
Show Arrows Pointing To Dead Bodies
Slowly drain everyone's power with hunger.

The Death is a Neutral Apocalypse role that kills everyone if they survive too long after transformation. They are invincible to everything but being exiled or guessing incorrectly. They win with other apocalypse members.
The souls of the dead were collected.\%nl\%\%role\%, Horseman of the Apocalypse, has emerged!
After transformation, an armageddon will begin. After a certain amount of time or the next meeting the armageddon will kill everyone else.
The \%role\% is unleashing a Armageddon in \%time\% seconds!
Death has emerged, the Armageddon begins!
Armageddon in progress, everyone dies in \%time\% seconds.
Death has been killed, Armageddon was halted.
Poison the crew to get away from kills with ease.
Poison the players to kill them with delay.
You poisoned \%player\%, they will die in \%time\% seconds.
A \%role\% has poisoned you! You will die in \%time\% seconds!
The Poisoner is a Impostor Killing role that can poison a player, killing them after a set amount of time.
Poison a player, after a set amount of time you will kill them.
Shoot down crew from the distance.
Aim at players to later kill them from a distance.
You aimed at \%player\%, you can shoot them now.
The Sniper is a Impostor Killing role that can aim at the player, later they can shoot the player previously aimed at.
Aim a player, to later shoot them.
Show Arrow To The Aimed Player
Recruit a player, turning them into a Mafioso.
You failed to recruit \%player\%, they aren't a crewmate role or aren't crew aligned!
You succesfully recruited \%player\%, and turned them into \%role\%!
You were recruited by \%player\%, the \%role\%, you are now \%new_role\%!
The Godfather is a Impostor Power role that can recruit a crewmate, turning them into Mafioso.
Recruit a crewmate turning them into Mafioso
Godfather Can Kill With Mafioso Alive
Lead the Godfather to the victory!
The Mafioso is a Impostor Support role that appears after Godfather recruits a crewmate.
Kill the crewmates with no regard for witnesses.
You are immune for being voted out as long as immunity lives.
\%player\% is the \%role\%! They cannot be killed until their immunity has been killed, immunity's alignment is \%alignment\%.
The immunity has died! \%player\, the \%role\% can now be killed!

The Demagogue is a Impostor Power role that is revealed to whole crew at the start of the first meeting. Random Neutral (Impostor if they aren't any, or Crewmate in extreme circumstances) player becomes a immunity. They cannot be ejected or killed in meetings while their immunity lives. Immunity and Impostors know who immunity is.
Demagogue Can Be Killed If Immunity Lives
Give Hints About Who Isn't Immunity
Your movement is inverted for \%time\% rounds!
Betray the crewmates as a member of Apocalypse.
The Prophet is a Crewmate Alliance modifier, which forces a crewmate to work for the apocalypse faction.
You are the \%modifier\%. You can only win with Apocalypse.
Help the Necromancer win as a part of his army!
The Ammit is a Secret Neutral Killing role that can devour players, killing them if they aren't killed before the meeting.
Devour a player, killing them if you survive to the meeting.
Bring forth the apocalypse upon crew and impostors alike!\%nl\%Fake Tasks:
You are a member of Apocalypse.
